data.name: WHERE THE HELL AM I?
data.detailed_description:
Where The Hell Am I? is an atmospheric exploration game crafted by an independent developer. Built with realistic graphics, it drops you into an unknown world where every shadow hides a story and every step deepens the mystery. Uncover the truth behind the question that started it all.

Where The Hell Am I? is an atmospheric first-person exploration game. Its diverse locations draw you into an unknown world where every shadow hides a story and every step deepens the mystery. Uncover the truth behind the mystery that started it all.

It will draw you in with its first-person camera angle, great music and magnificent atmosphere.

In our story, our main character Abel is going through difficult times. One night, when he least expects it, he finds himself in the middle of a very strange place. He will have interesting experiences as he tries to escape from the strange situation he is in. In the meantime, it will also change his perspective on life.

Contents:

-Different Realities

-Voiceovers

-Interaction

-Amazing Sound Design

-Realistic Graphics

-Mind-Blowing Story

With its unique locations and captivating story, "WHERE THE HELL AM I?" is waiting to meet you.

data.short_description: Where The Hell Am I? is an atmospheric first-person exploration game. Its diverse locations draw you into an unknown world where every shadow hides a story and every step deepens the mystery. Uncover the truth behind the mystery that started it all. Are you ready to get lost in different realities?
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 保加利亞文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 繁體中文, 日文, 韓文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 波蘭文, 匈牙利文, 挪威文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 希臘文, 捷克文, 瑞典文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
